race.comment: LOOK HERE (2) finds the maiden win elusive but it certainly hasn't been without trying. Peaking now fourth-up and gets the key booking of Boudvillain. Ready. I AM OVERS (7) has been much better in her last two and looks suited stepping out to 1500m fourth-up. Keeps Nock and should find this a bit easier than recent. Main danger. LET'S BE HONEST (5) has mixed her form this prep but boasts solid peaks. Should get a nice tow into the race from her draw and is among the chances. ROY KELTON (4) has been thereabouts in his first two starts and should be further improved. Is a lightly-raced five-year-old that can improve sharply without surprising.
